get.description: Returns detailed information about a therapy stage
Returns detailed information about a quiz
Returns detailed information about a specific project

delete.description: Deletes a project and removes all associations

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific patient
US-K-26: Returns the current user's notification preferences (creates defaults on first access).

put.description: US-K-26: Upserts the current user's notification channel toggles and quiet hours.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific material
Returns details of a specific therapy event
Returns detailed information about a badge

put.description: Changes the status of a specific user
Changes the role of a specific user
Resets the password for a specific user and generates a temporary password

get.description: US-A-05: Returns global system configuration (compliance threshold, language, notifications). Placeholder backed by hardcoded defaults until a feature-flag store is implemented.

put.description: US-A-05: Accepts a key/value map of settings. Currently logs requested updates but does not persist them (placeholder for feature-flag store).

get.summary: Get data processing activity by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific data processing activity

put.description: Updates an existing data processing activity record

delete.description: Deletes a data processing activity record

get.description: Returns all therapy stages for a project

post.description: Creates a new therapy stage
Reorders therapy stages using drag & drop
Manually unlocks a stage for a patient
Marks a stage as completed for a patient
Exports a report to PDF or Excel format

get.description: Returns all quizzes for a project

post.description: Creates a new educational quiz
Deactivates a quiz
Starts a new quiz attempt for a patient
Activates a quiz for patients
Submits answers and completes a quiz attempt

get.description: Returns a list of projects with optional filtering by status or name

post.description: Creates a new therapeutic project

get.description: Returns patients enrolled in a project

post.description: Assigns one or more patients to a project

delete.description: Removes one or more patients from a project

post.description: Removes the patient from the source project (with audit reason) and enrolls them into the target project in a single transaction

get.description: Returns a paginated list of patients with optional filtering

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name to search for (first or last name)

parameters.name: hisPatientId
parameters.description: HIS patient ID to filter by

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: User status to filter by (ACTIVE, BLOCKED, etc.)

parameters.name: verificationStatus
parameters.description: Verification status to filter by (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED)

post.description: Creates a new patient record
Verifies patient data against Hospital Information System
Calls the HIS to confirm the patient's identity from PESEL + cart number
Executes a bulk operation (assign-to-project|update-status|anonymize) on a list of patients

get.description: Returns a list of message threads with optional filtering

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Thread type to filter by (INDIVIDUAL, GROUP)

post.description: Creates a new message thread

get.description: Returns messages in a specific thread

post.description: Sends a new message to a thread
Exports a conversation thread as PDF document
Marks a message as read by the current user
Uploads a file attachment to a message

get.description: Returns a list of materials with optional filtering

post.description: Creates a new educational material
Records a view for an educational material
Unpublishes an educational material
Publishes an educational material
Marks an educational material as completed
Marks all messages in a thread as read
Delegates a thread to a team member with status update

get.description: Returns a list of therapy events with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new therapy event
Exports a therapy event to iCal format
Marks a therapy event as completed

get.description: Returns all active badges

post.description: Creates a new gamification badge
Marks a badge as notified

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users with optional filters

post.description: US-A-01: Creates a new staff user account (ADMIN/DOCTOR/COORDINATOR/NURSE/THERAPIST) with hashed password and Staff profile.
Forces a password reset for a staff user, invalidates all sessions
Clears 2FA secret and backup codes for a user
US-K-25: Triggers the event reminder scan for the 24h-ahead window. Returns count + event IDs that matched.
Clears the system cache
Creates a system backup
Exports system logs to CSV or JSON format
US-NH-01: Rejects a pending patient verification with a mandatory justification (min 10 characters).
Generates an 8-character activation code valid for 72 hours
US-NH-01: Approves a pending patient verification using HIS lookup or manual override with justification.
US-A-10: Anonymizes patient personal data (RODO Art. 17). Replaces PESEL, name, email, phone, date of birth, and address with anonymized values.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all data processing activities (RODO Art. 30)

post.description: Creates a new data processing activity record (RODO Art. 30)
Restores system from a specific backup. Implements ww.68
Creates a new system backup. Implements ww.68
Exports audit logs to CSV or JSON format

Returns all quiz attempts for a patient

Returns team members assigned to a project

Returns active projects where current user is a team member
Searches for patients by PESEL, name, or HIS ID

Returns the count of unread messages for the current user

US-A-11: Exports all patient data (RODO Art. 20 - right to data portability). Includes personal data, projects, messages, materials, events, quiz attempts, badges, and audit logs.
Returns erasure audit trail for a patient.
US-NH-01: Returns patients with verification_status = PENDING, sorted by created_at DESC.

delete.description: Deletes an old backup to free up storage space

get.description: Downloads backup file for offline storage
Returns list of all backups with their status. Implements ww.68
Returns a paginated list of audit logs with optional filters
Returns detailed information about a specific audit log

delete.description: US-A-12: Hard-deletes patient data (RODO Art. 17 - right to be forgotten). Requires patient to be in deleted state for at least 30 days (cooling period).

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force erasure without cooling period (requires super-admin)

CompleteEventRequest.description: Completion data with optional patient notes
